use_cases: Landing page hero sections requiring attention-grabbing animated typography
Product announcements and marketing pages needing cinematic text reveal effects
Portfolio and creative agency websites showcasing animated headlines
SaaS landing pages for product launches with dramatic text animations
Interactive presentations and demos featuring character-by-character text reveals
ai_summary: A cinematic text reveal component that splits text into individual characters and animates them sequentially with a replay button. Features full light/dark mode support via CSS variables and clean, minimalist styling. Designed for landing pages and marketing content where visual impact and animated typography create engagement. Self-contained with no external dependencies beyond React.
